name: healthcare_adverse_event
description: Adverse events correlated with treatment severity and study drug

columns.name: participant_id
columns.description: Foreign key to study participants table

generation.notes: maxValue is dynamically set to 30000 + n_participants - 1

columns.name: ae_term
columns.description: MedDRA preferred term for the adverse event

columns.name: onset_day
columns.description: Day of onset relative to treatment start (severity-dependent)

generation.expr: CASE WHEN severity = 'Severe' THEN cast(1 + rand() * 30 as int) WHEN severity = 'Moderate' THEN cast(1 + rand() * 90 as int) ELSE cast(1 + rand() * 180 as int) END
CASE WHEN severity = 'Severe' THEN cast(7 + rand() * 21 as int) WHEN severity = 'Moderate' THEN cast(3 + rand() * 10 as int) ELSE cast(1 + rand() * 5 as int) END

columns.name: related_to_study_drug
columns.description: Whether the AE is related to the study drug (probability increases with severity)

generation.expr: CASE WHEN severity = 'Severe' THEN rand() < 0.7 WHEN severity = 'Moderate' THEN rand() < 0.5 ELSE rand() < 0.3 END

columns.name: action_taken
columns.description: Clinical action taken in response (nested CASE on severity)

generation.expr: CASE WHEN severity = 'Severe' THEN CASE WHEN rand() < 0.6 THEN 'Dose Reduced' WHEN rand() < 0.8 THEN 'Treatment Interrupted' ELSE 'Treatment Discontinued' END WHEN severity = 'Moderate' THEN CASE WHEN rand() < 0.5 THEN 'Dose Reduced' WHEN rand() < 0.8 THEN 'No Action' ELSE 'Treatment Interrupted' END ELSE 'No Action' END

columns.name: ae_description
columns.description: Free-text description of the adverse event

generation.expr: concat(ae_term, ': ', lower(severity), '. Reported on day ', cast(onset_day as string), ' of treatment.')
generation.notes: Uses a hidden report_day helper column in generator for the day reference
